name: Ohio Angel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Grease cookie sheets.
Beat shortening in a mixing bowl with an electric mixer on medium to high speed for 30 seconds.
Add brown sugar, 1/2 cup granulated sugar, baking soda, cream of tartar, and salt. Beat until mixed.
Add egg and vanilla extract. Beat until combined.
Mix in as much flour as possible with the mixer.
Stir any remaining flour with a wooden spoon.
Shape dough into 1-inch balls. Roll each ball in the remaining 1/2 cup sugar.
Place cookies 2 inches apart on cookie sheets.
Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove and cool completely on a wire rack.
